---
title: "vas_minus10"
subtitle: "`vas_minus10`"
description: "vas_minus10"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/vas_minus10/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                 | Title                              | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                             |
|--------------------------------------|------------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                              | The unique name of the event       | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                      |
| `center`                             | Research center                    | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_hunger_fasted_minus10min`       | vas_hunger_fasted_minus10min       | number | Visual analogue scale. How hungry do you feel, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor sulten er du?. Slider scale labels: Jeg er slet ikke sulten |  | Jeg har aldrig været mere sulten    |
| `vas_satisfaction_fasted_minus10min` | vas_satisfaction_fasted_minus10min | number | Visual analogue scale. How satiated do you feel, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor mæt er du?. Slider scale labels: Jeg har et stort hul i maven |  | Jeg kan ikke få en bid mere ned |
| `vas_full_fasted_minus10min`         | vas_full_fasted_minus10min         | number | Visual analogue scale. How full do you feel, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor fyldt op føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Slet ikke fyldt op |  | Fyldt totalt op                   |
| `vas_how_much_fasted_minus10min`     | vas_how_much_fasted_minus10min     | number | Visual analogue scale. How much do you think you can eat, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor meget tror du, at du kan spise?. Slider scale labels: Slet ingenting |  | Virkelig meget  |
| `vas_comfort_fasted_minus10min`      | vas_comfort_fasted_minus10min      | number | Visual analogue scale. Level of comfort, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvordan føler du dig tilpas?. Slider scale labels: Virkelig dårligt |  | Virkelig godt                          |
| `vas_nausea_fasted_minus10min`       | vas_nausea_fasted_minus10min       | number | Visual analogue scale. Any nausea, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du kvalme?. Slider scale labels: Ja, meget |  | Nej, slet ikke                                                    |
| `vas_thirst_fasted_minus10min`       | vas_thirst_fasted_minus10min       | number | Visual analogue scale. How thirsty do you feel, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor tørstig føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Overhovedet ikke |  | Virkelig meget                    |
| `vas_sweet_fasted_minus10min`        | vas_sweet_fasted_minus10min        | number | Visual analogue scale. Would you like something sweet, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget sødt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke |  | Ja, meget          |
| `vas_salt_fasted_minus10min`         | vas_salt_fasted_minus10min         | number | Visual analogue scale. Would you like something savoury, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget salt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke |  | Ja, meget        |
| `vas_fat_fasted_minus10min`          | vas_fat_fasted_minus10min          | number | Visual analogue scale. Would you like something fatty, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget fedtrigt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke |  | Ja, meget      |

: Fields in the `vas_minus10` resource.
